video.title: SSM TV
video.description: Watch our latest videos on YouTube

about.title: About Us
about.description: SSM TV is a platform delivering news, discussions, and analyses related to business, economy, and development. Our goal is to provide truthful and timely information in Rwanda and beyond.
about.missionText: To deliver truthful, timely, and comprehensive news in an accessible format for everyone.
about.visionText: To become a trusted news source in Africa and worldwide.
about.teamText: We work with professional journalists, analysts, and media experts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have a question, suggestion, or news tip, reach out to us using the form below.

footer.about: SSM TV is a platform delivering news, discussions, and analyses. Follow us on YouTube to stay updated with our videos.

advertise.headline: Advertise on SSM TV
advertise.subheadline: Grow your business with digital media
advertise.description: Place your business in front of SSM TV's audience. Reach thousands of readers in Rwanda and beyond through our website and YouTube channel.
